CustomField.formula: IF( AND(Flosum__isExtensible__c, NOT(Flosum__from_Git__c)), HYPERLINK('/apex/'+$Setup.Flosum__Credentials__c.Flosum__Namespace__c+'SnapshotToGitCommit?sid='+ Id , IMAGE('/resource/icons/button2.png','Click to create new Snapshot',24,95)),'')
CustomField.label: External Repository
